title: Software Update - DFU - Headset low battery: dialog stays when HS is turned off
scenario: Low battery DFU dialog persists on screen when headset is turned off, and does not auto-dismiss on Settings page
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Navigate to Home screen and ensure a headset is connected.
3. Go to Device Settings for the connected headset.
4. Initiate a Device Firmware Update (DFU) while the headset battery is less than 5%.
5. Observe that a low battery dialog is displayed on screen.
6. While the low battery dialog is open, press the Power button on the headset to turn it off.
7. Observe the behavior of the low battery dialog.
8. Now, navigate to the Settings page (e.g., Home → Settings or Account).
9. Again initiate DFU with battery < 5% to trigger the low battery dialog.
10. While the dialog is present on the Settings page, turn off the headset using the Power button.
11. Observe the dialog and the current screen state.
expected: When the headset is turned off while the low battery dialog is open on the Home/Device Settings screen, the dialog should close automatically. When the headset is turned off while the dialog is open on the Settings page, the dialog should close and the user should remain on the Settings page for the disconnected device.
